review_title: Easy to Use e-commerce website solution
description: Grew my business, I am doing easier management of my business and the sales has grown over the months. I am totally happy with the Zencommerce website solution.
author: Sahil G.
pros: Support Staff is well educated User-friendly Interface Enough options to customize YouTube Channel explains the product well Value for the money I pay
cons: For me, there are no negative points as it fulfills my business needs

author: Rajat G.
pros: This product suits the likely needs of anyone who is just starting up an online venture and wants to purchase a suitable product managing entire business life-cycle through one stop solution in cost effective manner. The platform consists of all major features and categories to manage an online business in most efficient way.
cons: The product is not scalable and restricted to the features provided by zen-commerce and hence cannot be customized according to ones best needs.

review_title: Very unprofessional and expensive. Don’t go
author: Sukhwinder S.
pros: Nothing wasted my money for nothing and they made a app which never worked
cons: I got ripped off and learnt a lesson to stay away from such unprofessional

author: Vishal B.
pros: Readymade software, Plug and play software only upload your products and start
cons: There should be more themes, current number of themes are low

description: Apart from the above-mentioned issues, the overall experience is Satisfactory, if the above API issues were resolved swiftly then the experience would have been great. But the team struggled for several days or at times a week to resolve the issues. Hence we had to face the loss in business and our customer satisfaction went low.
author: Mangesh D.
pros: One Window solution to all. We have Payment gateway, Accounting Software, Shipping integration and Marketing Software integration all in one console. Features are simple and easy to use for an individual who has no knowledge of Coding. Once the shop is set up, anyone with access can modify and change everything instantly.
cons: Customer Support needs to be improved, Most of the reports are not available for download, Major issues with the API integrations with Payment Gateways, Accounting Software, Shipping. New features for up sales are not available. No Place to add the Video of the products. Need external help even for the Basic SEO functions. Multiple steps checkout process.

description: The best Team - behind Zencommerce - Mumbai. S9fashion.com - came onboard in 2017, have stayed here so far, and always will. Highly Experienced IT Professionals,4.5 Star rating Out Of 5 - there is always Scope of Improvement and Team Effort -
author: Nishant A.
pros: Integration in My Main Business is yet to Integrate- Given request for the same
cons: Does Not Compress Images to The correct Size Needed - avoiding the site to Go Bulky and Slow

description: Zen Ecommerce has developed excellent e-commerce websites for us .They are experts at building robust, scalable, secure and easy to use websites that can scale to meet our business needs. Their team of developers and project managers have worked closely with us to support our needs for an effective website.
author: Irfan C.
pros: Zen Ecommerce has developed excellent e-commerce websites for us .They are experts at building robust, scalable, secure and easy to use websites that can scale to meet our business needs. Their team of developers and project managers have worked closely with us to support our needs for an effective website.
cons: So far have been better than most other developers that we have tried before - Have been generally quite happy after doing 4 websites with them ( for business & social ).So do not have any CONS for now.

author: Vidhi A.
pros: Good service, courteous staff. Would definitely recommend them to everyone.
cons: All good. Not many cons. I wish them all the best.

author: Iftekhar A.
pros: Customer support, Especially by talking with miss [SENSITIVE CONTENT] .
cons: Some time it slowing down may be for heavy media load

review_title: The most affordable and yet powerful e-commerce SaaS product
description: Wonderful, one should try it before spending lot of money on other expensive software.
author: Srikanth D.
pros: It is user friendly and has almost all the features for any small and medium sized ecommerce website. I can't think what feature it doesn't have, I like their customer service as well. I'm using ZenCommerce from past 3+ years for my Chocolate website [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]
cons: Can't think of any. Their product is wonderful and customer care is super. I wish them good luck.

author: Satish K.
pros: EASY TO UPLOAD PRODUCTS AND ALL FEATURES
cons: THEAMES IS VERY LOCAL TO USE, U CAN ADD MORE NICE THEAMS FOR CUSTOMERS
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: One word to describe experience is SATISFACTORY.
author: Meena S.
pros: It has capability to serve an e-commerce business, well equipped with various apps & links to major service providers within the software like ... Payment Gateways, Shipping Gateway or Financial Service providers.
cons: One has to learn all the steps to complete the order or create the shipment. But it can be more user friendly where system itself asks next required information in successive steps. Which will provide an ease to use.

description: im still with them because of it is painful to transition the entire system to another platform
author: vivek B.
pros: NONE. it looked simple at the time of selection but as my requirement for necessary functionality increased zencommerce started looking more and more incapable of handling them.
cons: very little customisation and non responsive customer support

author: Barun A.
pros: Everything, all features, themes , taxation and Own integrations
cons: Billing , invoicing could have been better

review_title: Pleasant and practically ease of use
description: Pleasant and practically ease to operate
author: Sandip P.
pros: Cost effective, intuitive, great crm and reporting
cons: Purchase basket process it has to be one page It's part of design

description: Helped in growing sales, marketing and good customer support.
author: Sanjay S.
pros: This software helped me in marketing my products Pan India when I was not able to reach them and also helped in growing my sales. Its a user friendly software and every member of Zencommerce is always available in any type of problem.
cons: I couldn't think any cons as I am very happy with the service.

description: Easy to use. creating new for customer and introduce to customer about new function. give free trial first
author: viral S.
pros: easy to use. Seo is very goods. Customer support is very good
cons: very simple theme. please give attractive theme

review_title: One of the finest companies i have interacted , very much customer oreiented [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and staffs
description: One of the best companies I've interacted, Great staffs very friendly approach and great customer service The [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been always helpful whenever I have an issue, A big thanks to him Great company to associate with, Zen commerce keeps up the good work!
author: Swaroop P.
pros: Great One , we never had an issue any time
cons: Nothing much I really don't have an issue

review_title: Do Hi-tech Website, without HiTech Knowledge...
author: Saumil A.
pros: Its solves your everyday purpose of Online Shopping, without having to get into codings. Most of the features are included in a single cost.
cons: Need more flexibility in terms of using 3-party software or API. But overall satisfactory and does solve the purpose.

author: Jitendra P.
pros: The ease of implementation. Reliability.
cons: Regular updation and new design options are implemented.

author: Ravindra S.
pros: The customer support system is very good
cons: technology is very good but it can improve further.

review_title: MOST AFFORDABLE AND EASY TO USE ECOMMERCE PLATFORM IN INDIA.
author: NIXON G.
pros: I CAN EASY DRAG AND DROP MY PRODUCTS SO MY WORK IS DONE QUICKLY (I DO NOT HAVE TO WAIT FOR MULTIPLE PAGES TO LOAD... THIS WAY MY TIME IS SAVED.)
cons: IDEALLY THERE IS NO CONS OF THIS SOFTWARE BUT THEY SHOULD HAVE MORE EXTERNAL INTEGRATIONS WITH COURIER PARTNERS.

description: During Early stage we found it a little difficult to use, but it is very fast to learn
author: Manit E.
pros: The whole experience of the back is good as its very user friendly
cons: Need more additional Plugins and more responsive and dynamic to other devices, as it does not support lot of mobile devices

description: Though the software is easy to use but it lacks lot of features and application which are being offered by its competitors like Shopify, Wix, Woo commerce, etc.
author: Rohit B.
pros: The software is very user friendly and easy to use.
cons: Poor customer support as it takes lot of follow ups to resolve any issue with the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: my overvall experience is fabulous and i am completely satisfied with zencommerce softwares , i will definetly recommend it to all my friends and knowns !
author: Ayush P.
pros: yes the product provided by zencommerce is very easy to use and affordable compared to other software alternatives providers available in the market.
cons: i think security features should be improved more in softwares
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
